_comment: Ashfall Dunes / Deep Sands - Levels 8–10. High-danger deep desert zone with heat mirages, undead, elementals, and the entrance to The Kragthar.
biome: treacherous deep desert, elemental rifts, ancient ruins, burial grounds

heat_mirage_settings.notes: Mirage enemies chase but deal 0 damage; vanish on hit.

effects.enemy_behavior: elementals and undead become more aggressive

signature_features.ancient_ruins: Crumbling stone structures with Dustwalker Warlord boss camp.
signature_features.elemental_rifts: Spawn points for sandshifters and elemental creatures.
signature_features.gnoll_warrens: Bonegnawer territory leading toward The Kragthar.
signature_features.kragthar_entrance: Hidden canyon mouth leading to the dungeon.

bonegnawer_gnolls.description: Gnoll packs that guard the entrance to The Kragthar.
bonegnawer_gnolls.notes: Social aggro; will assist nearby gnolls.

dustwalkers.description: Elite Dustwalker forces operating near the ruins.

undead.description: Spirits and phantoms awakened by Void disturbances.

story_seeds: Traitor’s Veil – expose Sandveil Order plot.
First major boss fight: Dustwalker Warlord.
Discover clues leading to The Kragthar.
Investigate elemental disturbances and phantom sightings.
